phases.name: Write simplicity benchmark loader test
phases.reasoning: Add test_simplicity_benchmarks_load test that verifies BenchmarkSuite::load returns 5 cases with correct names, non-empty code/context, and at least 1 must_find per case. This test will fail (red) until benchmark files are created.

phases.name: Create all 5 simplicity benchmark cases
phases.reasoning: Create 15 files across 5 directories: overcomplex-resolution-mode, dead-escalate-path, dead-strict-mode, verbose-let-chains, and premature-abstraction. Each gets code.rs (Rust source with annotated simplicity issues), context.md (background for reviewer), and expected.json (must_find/must_not_flag entries). Validate all JSON files parse correctly and test passes green.
